name: Content Review — ClickUp Task on Submission

nodes.name: Write ClickUp Task ID to Supabase

main.node: Write ClickUp Task ID to Supabase

notes: Triggered by Supabase webhook on INSERT to content_review_log. Creates a ClickUp task for Ewa to review. Writes the task ID back to the log row for traceability. 2026-05-19: hard-coded status removed — task lands in the target list's default open status (always valid, no list-status config dependency). Review state of record is content_review_log.status, not the ClickUp task status. 2026-05-19: removed all environment-variable references (n8n on the VPS does not expose them) — list id 901218140081 hardcoded; Supabase auth via bound 'Supabase Service Role' httpCustomAuth credential (apikey + Authorization headers, stored in n8n). Supabase project URL baked in (phqrjtnflovicgkngieu).
